meta_description: Join the Nation Card and enjoy -20% on every menu, all year long. Request it in 2 minutes; once approved, your card arrives on WhatsApp.
hero_subtitle: Fill in your details and send your request. Once approved, your card lands on WhatsApp. 100% free, no proof required.
title: Membership form
subtitle: Takes less than 2 minutes ⚡
phone_hint: Ivorian number (WhatsApp) — this is where you'll receive your card.
photo_hint: A recent, clearly visible photo (for verification).
photo_invalid: The file must be an image.
establishment_placeholder: e.g. University of Abidjan, high school…
optin_label: I agree to receive my Nation Card and related updates on WhatsApp.
legal_note: By submitting, you agree to be pre-registered in the program. No document required.
error_generic: We couldn't send your request right now. Please try again in a moment.
success_subtitle: Your request is in. Once approved, your Nation Card arrives on WhatsApp. Download the app to start using it.
success_step_1: Once your request is approved, you'll receive your card and the app link on WhatsApp.
success_step_2: Download the Chicken Nation app and sign in with this same number.
